'''gaputu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylite|xylite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-p-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylite|xylite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gaputu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæpitith|gæpitith]] || [[word:gæpitij|gæpitij]] || [[word:gæpitish|gæpitish]] || [[word:gæpiti|gæpiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gapupututh|gapupututh]] || [[word:gapuputuj|gapuputuj]] || [[word:gapuputush|gapuputush]] || [[word:gapuputu|gapuputu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gapututh|gapututh]] || [[word:gaputuj|gaputuj]] || [[word:gaputush|gaputush]] || [[word:gaputu|gaputu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gapuftuth|gapuftuth]] || [[word:gapuftuj|gapuftuj]] || [[word:gapuftush|gapuftush]] || [[word:gapuftuf|gapuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gapututhu|gapututhu]] || [[word:gaputuju|gaputuju]] || [[word:gaputushu|gaputushu]] || [[word:gaputuku|gaputuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gapututh|gapututh]] || [[word:gaputuj|gaputuj]] || [[word:gaputush|gaputush]] || [[word:gaputu|gaputu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gapututhul|gapututhul]] || [[word:gaputujul|gaputujul]] || [[word:gaputushul|gaputushul]] || [[word:gaputukul|gaputukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gapututhuthu|gapututhuthu]] || [[word:gaputujuju|gaputujuju]] || [[word:gaputushushu|gaputushushu]] || [[word:gaputuku|gaputuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gapututhun|gapututhun]] || [[word:gaputujun|gaputujun]] || [[word:gaputushun|gaputushun]] || [[word:gaputukun|gaputukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gapututhuoro|gapututhuoro]] || [[word:gaputujuoro|gaputujuoro]] || [[word:gaputushuoro|gaputushuoro]] || [[word:gaputukuoro|gaputukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
